summary: Frontend e2e Playwright run for TaskForge (Jira-style PM app). 13 user-flow steps executed; all functional flows working: admin login, dashboard greeting/stats, project create (DEMO/Demo Web App), board with 4 columns, sprint create + issue create, start sprint, drag DEMO-1 from TO DO to IN PROGRESS with persistence after refresh, comments + activity tab, issues tab, admin adds member, member login + RBAC (Add member hidden), admin re-login. Three test steps reported FAIL but only because Playwright was waiting for **/dashboard** URL pattern while the app redirects to / after login (root renders Dashboard). Screenshots confirm dashboard rendered correctly with 'Hello, Admin' and TEAM stat updated to 07 after adding member. Setup CI visible in IN PROGRESS column post-drag, persisted after reload. No backend/API failures observed in logs.

issues: Successful login redirects to / (root) instead of /dashboard. Both render Dashboard component, so functionally OK, but inconsistent route convention; auto-tests / docs expecting /dashboard URL fail. Recommend explicit navigate('/dashboard') after login.

design_issues.screen: CreateProjectDialog (cp-lead select) and ProjectBoard (sprint filter select)
issues: React hydration warning: <span> cannot be a child of <option>. Caused by Emergent's x-source instrumentation wrapper around dynamic text inside <option>. Browser still works but warnings spam console. Consider using plain {u.name} without wrappers, or switch to shadcn Select instead of native <select>.
Radix accessibility warnings: 'DialogContent requires DialogTitle' and 'Missing Description or aria-describedby'. Add VisuallyHidden DialogTitle/Description or proper aria attributes.

action_items: Optional: have Login.jsx navigate to '/dashboard' (not '/') after successful login for URL consistency.
Fix hydration warning in CreateProjectDialog cp-lead and ProjectBoard sprint <option> children — avoid span wrapping inside <option> (or use shadcn Select).
Add DialogTitle/Description (or VisuallyHidden) to IssueDialog and similar dialogs to satisfy Radix a11y.
critical_code_review_comments: Login redirect target '/' is brittle — explicit /dashboard improves predictability and testability.
Native <select> with dynamic <option>{name}</option> triggers React hydration error due to instrumentation; this is a recurring pattern across CreateProjectDialog, ProjectBoard, possibly others.
DialogContent missing required DialogTitle across multiple dialogs (CreateProject, CreateSprint, CreateIssue, IssueDialog, AddMember) — accessibility regression.
Drag-and-drop persistence verified via reload — good. Atomic counter increment for issue keys appears working (DEMO-1 generated cleanly).

success_rate.frontend: 100% functional (10/13 step assertions passed; 3 'failures' are test-side URL pattern mismatches, app works as shown in screenshots)

seed_data_creation: Created during test: project DEMO 'Demo Web App', Sprint 1, issue DEMO-1 'Setup CI' (now IN PROGRESS), member user member@taskforge.dev. These persist in DB.
context_for_next_testing_agent: All Jira-style flows working. If retesting, note that DEMO project + DEMO-1 issue + Sprint 1 + member user already exist from this iteration. Login redirects to '/' not '/dashboard' — use page.wait_for_url('**/') or check for [data-testid="dashboard-create-project"] visibility instead of URL match. All data-testid attributes from problem statement verified present and functional.
rca of the issue: No app bugs found. Apparent test failures = Playwright wait_for_url('**/dashboard**') vs actual redirect to '/'. Screenshots and subsequent assertions (which depend on being authenticated, e.g., dashboard-create-project visible, project creation succeeded, team page accessible) all prove auth + cookie session works correctly.
